x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Software models are the structured foundation that Now Assist SAM uses for AI license analysis and optimization. Without model coverage, AI cannot identify license waste, reclamation candidates, or optimization opportunities across the software estate.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No software install records found", finding: "No software install records found. Now Assist SAM has no data to analyze for license optimization or reclamation recommendations." }; } var gaModel = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaModel.addQuery("software_model", "!=", ""); gaModel.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaModel.query(); var withModel = gaModel.next() ? parseInt(gaModel.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withModel / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of software installs have a model (" + withModel + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of software installs are linked to a software model. Now Assist SAM has strong structured data for AI-powered license analysis and optimization." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of software installs have a software model (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations will have reduced accuracy without complete model coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of software installs have a software model. Insufficient structured data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Normalize software installs against the ServiceNow software model library. Use the SAM Normalization workspace to identify and map unrecognized software. Target: 80%+ model coverage.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_d3f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9b
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Software models are the structured foundation that Now Assist SAM uses for AI license analysis and optimization. Without model coverage, AI cannot identify license waste, reclamation candidates, or optimization opportunities across the software estate.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Software Model Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaTotal.query(); var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (total === 0) { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No software install records found", finding: "No software install records found. Now Assist SAM has no data to analyze for license optimization or reclamation recommendations." }; } var gaModel = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_sam_sw_install"); gaModel.addQuery("software_model", "!=", ""); gaModel.addAggregate("COUNT"); gaModel.query(); var withModel = gaModel.next() ? parseInt(gaModel.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var pct = Math.round((withModel / total) * 100); var actualValue = pct + "% of software installs have a model (" + withModel + "/" + total + ")"; if (pct >= 80) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: pct + "% of software installs are linked to a software model. Now Assist SAM has strong structured data for AI-powered license analysis and optimization." }; } else if (pct >= 50) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of software installs have a software model (target: 80%+). Now Assist SAM AI recommendations will have reduced accuracy without complete model coverage." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + pct + "% of software installs have a software model. Insufficient structured data for meaningful Now Assist SAM AI license optimization recommendations." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>SAM</module><number>CHK0000619</number><order>200</order><remediation_guidance>Normalize software installs against the ServiceNow software model library. Use the SAM Normalization workspace to identify and map unrecognized software. Target: 80%+ model coverage.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>d3f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Software Model Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_d3f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c9b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
